details.test: Task 1: Book stress management session with top-rated coach
Task 2: Add cheapest 4-session career change package under $400 to cart
Task 3: Create reading list with 3 productivity articles
Task 4: Join 14-day self-discipline challenge with daily email reminders only
Task 5: Complete life balance assessment and save results to dashboard
Task 6: Contact high-rated coach with free consultation (morning, communication message)
Task 7: Bookmark two time management posts and one working-parents worksheet
Task 8: Build and save custom plan with 2 sessions + 1 workshop under $300
